The Library

On the Orthodox Faith

Writings on Orthodox Christian belief and practice — the spiritual life, the teaching of the Fathers, and the path of repentance and prayer.

Spiritual Warfare in the Orthodox Christian Life July 20, 2026 The unseen battle of the heart: how the Fathers teach us to fight the passions through prayer, fasting, repentance, and the Holy Mysteries. Read →
Public-domain texts (KJV 1611, Brenton's Septuagint 1851). Also available as an iOS app.
